title: T.N. Assembly election 2026 | BJP may try to split DMK alliance even if it gets a majority: Thol. Thirumavalavan
description: ‘I’ve wanted to contest in the Assembly election since 2021. How we function in the Assembly shapes the public perception. Going to Parliament is an honour. But, when I look at Tamil Nadu politics, the BJP’s strategy of gradually weakening regional parties and establishing itself is a cause for concern’
